essence: Installs and maintains advanced fire‑suppression systems that protect buildings, equipment, and critical infrastructure.

identity.title: Fire Suppression Systems Technician
identity.summary: Installs, tests, and services fire‑suppression systems such as gas suppression, foam systems, mist systems, and specialist industrial protection.

salary.notes: Technicians specialising in complex industrial, data‑centre, or marine suppression systems can exceed £55k-£70k+.

qualifications: Training in fire‑suppression installation and maintenance
Knowledge of gas, foam, and mist suppression technologies
Ability to test, fault‑find, and certify suppression systems
Understanding of pumps, valves, control panels, and safety protocols

lifestyle.description: Fire suppression systems technicians work across commercial, industrial, and specialist environments installing and maintaining advanced suppression systems. The role involves technical diagnostics, safety‑critical testing, and ensuring compliance with strict standards. It suits individuals who enjoy complex systems, problem‑solving, and contributing to high‑level fire protection.

habits: Follows strict installation and safety standards
Keeps accurate maintenance and certification records
Communicates clearly with clients and contractors
Diagnoses faults in complex systems methodically
